description: Data extracted from a Sunshine Cleaning call by SunnyBee. Used in VAPI's analysis.structuredData configuration. v2.0 — supports full property, per-room, and commercial quotes.

propertyType.description: Type of property to be cleaned

sqft.description: Approximate square footage of the property

isOccupied.description: Whether the property is currently occupied

conditionLevel.description: Current condition: light (routine), moderate (visible buildup), restoration (heavy buildup)

rooms.description: Specific rooms requested for partial/per-room cleaning

frequency.description: How often the service should repeat

addOns.description: Additional services: inside_oven, inside_fridge, inside_cabinets, baseboards, blinds, walls, garage, laundry, pet_hair

preferredSchedule.description: Preferred days and time (e.g., 'weekday mornings', 'Saturday afternoon')

quotedPrice.description: Price quoted during the call via get_cleaning_quote tool (in dollars)

quotedPriceExact.description: Whether the quoted price was an exact match from the pricing matrix

depositRequired.description: Whether a deposit was required (true for Deep Cleans)

contactPreference.description: How the caller prefers to be contacted

outcome.description: Call outcome: booked (date locked), interested (wants quote/follow-up), callback (call back later), not_interested, voicemail, out_of_area

scheduledDate.description: Scheduled service date if booked (ISO format or natural language)

notes.description: Any additional notes, special requests, or objections mentioned
